emails.subject: Re: Setoff Provisions
emails.body: Re: Setoff Provisions Elizabeth: I agree with their comments, although credit may have something to say about the change made in the ISDA language from "owed" to "payable". Alos, should we include affiliates on both sides? Carol St. Clair EB 3889 713-853-3989 (Phone) 713-646-3393 (Fax) carol.st.clair@enron.com Elizabeth Sager 05/08/2001 08:20 AM
